feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Integration Suite, Basic Edition - Restricted No. of Messages 10K & Exceeding the Messages Actions
entry.content:
The customer has in scope "Integration suite - basic edition", and the number of outbound/inbound messages are limited to 10K, with the metrics definition of the messages.

My questions here are:
1- What is the recommendations to be taken to minimize the number of messages during the integration design?
2- Regarding monitoring the messages, I know it is available and can monitor during the operation, what if the messages exceeded the limit 10K, I know it will be payed as an extra 1 block of 10K messages, but how this will be planned, for the customer can plan his payments?

entry.title: Integration suite - trading partner management - EDIFACT envelope
entry.content:
Hello integration experts,

In trying to build a mapping guideline (MAG) using two mapping implementation guidelines (idoc to EDI), I stumble upon the problem that the interchange control UNB-S0020 and UNZ-S0020 are not filled. Does anyone know how to configure or code this? In my specific case, those two fields should be the same in an EDI, but can vary between EDIs. Thanks in advance

entry.title: URL giving empty response from POSTMAN/CPI but working fine with Browser
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I am trying to use the URL from browser to get the details, it is working as expected(No Authentication Required). But, when trying to get the details from POSTMAN it is showing an empty response [].

Similar is the case with CPI HTTP adapter as well.

Please suggest, where I am going wrong. I tried other methods apart from GET but nothing working.

Thanks,

Nidhi

entry.title: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am wondering if I want to specify to which decimal place I would like to round for a certain value in SAP Cloud Integration, is there any standard function I can use?

Right now I am aware that I can use "Message Mapping" - "Round Function".

However, with this function, I can not round the results to one decimal place by rounding the second decimal place. 

If I want to, for example, round "18.2252" to "18.23", is there any standard function in message mapping I can use? (Maybe FormatNumber?But I do not know how to use it)

Or the only way would be UDF?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Monday.com and S/4HANA Public integration
entry.content:
My customer are using Monday.com to track their projects and want to integrate this with SAP. They are currently using S/4HANA Public. 
Do we have any customer reference or other customers that have done this integration? 

Many thanks!

entry.title: Issue subscribing to an event broker from solace in CI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to subscribe to an event broker created on solace through advanced event mesh adapter in CI. I am getting the below mentioned error on deploying the iFlow. Please assist.

Regards,

Varun Vichare.

entry.title: Is AEM adapter available in NEO environment ?
entry.content:
Do you know if Advanced event mesh adapter is available in neo environment ? 

Thanks

entry.title: Cloud Integration requirement
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is the below scenario possible using SAP BTP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration).

Our Integration Suite is hosted on public cloud.. Is the below scenario possible to achieve using SAP BTP Integration Suite? Can we establish the connectivity using Kafka adapter? What information Should I collect from Sender system? Could you please let me know the steps needed to achieve this requirement? Thank you in advance for your inputs..

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Integration Suite - iFlow Authorization Error
entry.content:
Hi ,
I don't know if the integration suite trial version is facing some issue, because this week I'm receiving the folow ERROR: "You are not authorized to edit the artifact due to access policies. Contact your tenant administrator for access." . If I try to create a new package iFlow, If I try to edit a existing iFlow, always iss the same error.

I tried to activated the Integration suite in another account nad it is not pssobiel ERROR again.

This two operation I tried in different workstation and occurs the same erros.

Is there any problem in SAP side?

Regards ,
Márcio

entry.title: Communication arrangement in SAP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are facing connection issue while creating communication arrangement in SAP,

issue: SOAP:1032 SRT: Wrong Content-Type and empty HTTP-B ody received: ("HTTP Code 401 : Unauthorized")

we tried changing user ID and password but it's still the same.

 Please suggest us on how to solve this error.

Regards

Pranavi Reddy

entry.title: MAIN_SHDRUN/SUBMOD_DIFFEXP/RUN_RDDIT006 were negative!
entry.content:
Hello,

I am getting error in sum phase MAIN_SHDRUN/SUBMOD_DIFFEXP/RUN_RDDIT006.

Below is the error logs.

SUM Version 2.0 sp21

SAPup.log

CURRENTPHASE MAIN_SHDRUN/SUBMOD_DIFFEXP/RUN_RDDIT006 ...started at 20241109030856 # Using phase log file 'PHASE_RUN.LOG'. ...begin processing at 20241109030856 ...finished at 20241109031254 with status FAILED. # Error message set: 'Batchjob 'RDDIT006' with id '03085700' is failed!' ...begin dialog at 20241109031256

PHASE_RUN.log

2 ETQ232 RFC Login succeeded 4 ETQ010 Date & Time: 20241109031254.808 1 ETQ233 Calling the function module "SUBST_LIST_SYS_LOGS" via RFC. 2 ETQ373 Parameter "JOBNAME" = "RDDIT006" 2 ETQ373 Parameter "JOBCOUNT" = "03085700" 2 ETQ373 Parameter "USERNAME" = "DDIC" 2 ETQ373 Parameter "DATE" = "20241109" 2 ETQ373 Parameter "TIME" = "031235" 2 ETQ373 Parameter "OUTPUT_FILENAME" = "JOB_03085700.DMP" 2 ETQ373 Parameter "DO_NOT_READ_SYS_LOG" = " " 2 ETQ374 Parameter "TIMESPAN" = "10" 4 ETQ010 Date & Time: 20241109031254.935 2WETQ399 Ignore syslog error messages. 2EETQ262 Batchjob "RDDIT006" failed! 4 ETQ010 Date & Time: 20241109031254 1EETQ399 Last generated error message is: Batchjob 'RDDIT006' with id '03085700' is failed! 1EETQ203 Upgrade phase "RUN_RDDIT006" terminated with errors ("20241109031254").

Background job log.

No such file or directory
No such file or directory
iterating message not written any more !! 00 001
previous message 107 times skipped: 00 001
Cannot access file S:\usr\sap\put\tmp\CUSTEXP.DEV
Job canceled after system exception ERROR_MESSAGE.

If any one face this type kindly help.

entry.title: Setup needed on SAP backend to generate events
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What is the techincal Setup needed on SAP backend to generate events? What are steps that should be followed on SAP Backend for generation of events, technical connection and also to publish the generated events to Advanced Event Mesh? Should there be channel created also?  Thank you!

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: Integration Suite -> not able to see Design -> Integrations and APIs
entry.content:
HI all

When I am opening the SAP Integration Suite I am not able to see Integrations and APIs under Design.

This is how it should look like:

I can only see 'Graph'

Am I missing a role or a user right?

Can you please help me.

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Test Connectivity to SAP Ariba - How to get Host URL
entry.content:
Hello Experts ..

We tried to Integrate SAP Ariba to ServiceNow using SAP BTP Integration Suite.

As a first step, trying to connect SAP BTP Integration Suite to SAP Ariba thru "Connectivity Tests".

Question: How do we get Host url of SAP Ariba?

We tried with https://S1.Ariba.com etc.. but getting "Couldn't connect to Hot".

Could you please help.

entry.title: Download com.sap.it.api.mapping.* jar file
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use com.sap.it.api.mapping.* in IntelliJ. However it results in an error due to missing JAR. Can someone help with resources from where I can download this?

Note : I have already imported the Script API and Generic API jar from https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloudintegration

Best Regards

entry.title: Sharepoint CSV-File integration in Datasphere's Data Flow leads to an error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we are currently trying to establish a connection between SAP Datasphere and a customer's SharePoint.

To do this, we followed the instructions described in the following blog entry...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/accessing-sharepoint-files-from-datasphere-using-btp-open-connectors/ba-p/13917779

...and successfully created the Integration Suite service, along with the SharePoint connector provided by the Open Connectors.

Here is the configuration of the Open Connectors pointing to Sharepoint:

 

Unfortunately, we have not yet been able to display a file in the Datasphere.

To do this, we created a "test.csv" with a handful of data, which is located in the "Documents/Datasphere_Test" directory.

We can already see this folder structure in the Dataflow of the Datasphere:

 

But as soon as we drag and drop the "test.csv" file in, we get the following error message:

 

The error message displayed, shows that the "test.csv" cannot be found.

The Open Connectors uses the following URL call, which leads to the error:

<company>.sharepoint.com/_api/web/GetFolderByServerRelativeUrl('Freigegebene%20Dokumente/Datasphere_Test/test.csv')

 

We have already experimented a bit here and tested via the browser that the file can be found via the following URL:

<company>.sharepoint.com/_api/Web/GetFileByServerRelativePath(decodedurl='/Freigegebene%20Dokumente/Datasphere_Test/test.csv')

We assume that we still need to define something in the Open Connectors configuration?

Is there perhaps a challenge with URL coding or something similar?

We would be grateful for any relevant information here.

Additional challenge:
The above named blog entry aims to ensure that we have access to the top level of the SharePoint. In the future, however, we also want to access sites, such as the site “Datalake” that we created here:

 

Here, too, the question arises  what we need to adjust the Open Connectors (or perhaps also in Sharepoint) so that we can also consume files that exist in the 'datalake' site.

 

Our attempt to adjust the Sharepoint site address in the form

<company>.sharepoint.com/sites/datalake

led to authentication errors.

 

If we leave the Sharepoint site address untouched (<company>.sharepoint.com), we can authenticate, but we cannot see the data structures of the site “datalake”.

 

Changing the “Document Library” property to

/sites/datalake/

was also unsuccessful.

 

Does anyone here have experience of how we need to adjust our configuration(s)?

 

Many thanks in advance,

M. Spyker

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - SQL Updata via JDBC Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am trying to trigger the following SQL in an I-Flow via the JDBC Adapter

 

 

UPDATE 
    TelHdr 
SET 
    STATUS=31 
WHERE 
    SND = xyz AND 
    TELEID = 1

 

 

Unfortunately, I always get the following error: 

 

  • "org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: PreparedStatementCallback; Zeichenfolgen- oder Binärdaten würden abgeschnitten.; nested exception is com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: Zeichenfolgen- oder Binärdaten würden abgeschnitten., cause: com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: Zeichenfolgen- oder Binärdaten würden abgeschnitten."

 

  • Error translated into English: ‘String or binary data would be truncated.’

 

This error means that the written value is too large for the written field.

The same update query was also executed with the same user directly in MS SQL Studio where it worked without problems, which means that the update query with these values and the user with the assigned roles was also checked and should work.

 

Procedure:

Step 1. JDBC Data Source Creation:

JDBC Data Source in the Integration Suite is set up and it is also possible to read values via a select.

The JDBC driver for Microsoft SQL Server was also changed from version 8.2.2 to 8.4.1 for test purposes, which unfortunately did not change the update behaviour.

Step 2. I-Flow Creation

- Set SQL Statement in the Content Modifier Body

Info: Reading this View via a regular select also works without problems with the same procedure, only the update runs on error

JDBC Adapter with the JDBC Data Source Alias

Error Appears: 

Has anyone already had this problem or has an idea of what to check?

Many thanks in advance.

 

Best regards

Chris P.

entry.title: SAP CPI Custom Adapter Development Spring Bean Usage
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am currently working on a custom adapter for the CPI. So far everything has gone smoothly. But I've been trying to register my written classes as Spring Beans in the existing Camel Context for some time now and it just doesn't want to work. Has anyone had any experience with this and can share here how it works and whether it is possible?

entry.title: How to get the error details in SAP CPI when calling via HTTPS?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

This is what I am trying to do.

I will call HTTPS from Postman, and the integration flow itself will show failure, which is my intention.

At the point when I call from Postman, the body of message only shows "An internal server error occured: The MPL ID of the failed message is : ......." and returned 500 internal server error as error code.

However, what I expect is that after calling from Postman, the body of message can show the details of error, just like what can be observed in SAP CPI. 

Plus, I hope that I can change the error code as well. Now it is 500 but is it possible to change it?

I am aware that this should be done by some groovy script. Does anyone know how to achieve this?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: "SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed" error in BTP trial account
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a trial BTP account and was following https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-starter-isuite-onboard-subscribe.html tutorial to Set Up the Integration Suite Trial account.

At step 4 "Automatically assign roles and create service instances using Booster" I am getting an error:

"SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed. Please subscribe the application and activate capabilities manually to proceed."

This is strange, as I have just subscribed to the SAP Integration Suite in a previous step (attached screenshots)

Has someone been able to fix this? I have found a similar question from 2022, so this seems to be a known issue. It's discouraging that SAP has not corrected the documentation, as it makes me less confident to follow these tutorials.

Thank you!
